items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every project is unique. After our discovery call, I'll provide a clear and detailed quote with no surprises. My rates are adapted to SMB realities.

items.question: What's the typical timeline?
items.answer: A working prototype is usually ready in 2 to 4 weeks. The full project depends on complexity, but I always prioritize short cycles and frequent deliverables.

items.question: I know nothing about AI, is that a problem?
items.answer: Not at all! That's exactly my role — to translate your business needs into technical solutions. You bring your business expertise, I handle the AI part.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: I work with the latest models (GPT, Claude, Gemini) and modern stacks (React, Node.js, Python, Supabase). I choose the best technology for each project.

seo.title: About — 5PennyAi
seo.description: Christian Couillard, founder of 5PennyAi. 20+ years of IT experience, passionate AI developer based in Québec.

hero.title: AI in service of your business.
hero.subtitle: Behind 5PennyAi, a passionate developer with 20+ years of IT experience.

story.section1_p1: After more than 20 years in information technology — including several years as a functional analyst at CGI, CHU de Québec, INSPQ, and the Quebec public sector — I founded 5PennyAi to dedicate myself entirely to what I love: building concrete AI solutions.
story.section1_p2: My experience in functional analysis taught me to listen to business needs before thinking about technology. Today, I combine that field-tested understanding with sharp technical expertise to develop AI applications that solve real problems.
story.section2_p1: I believe artificial intelligence shouldn't be reserved for large companies with unlimited budgets. SMBs have concrete needs — automating a process, analyzing data, improving customer experience — and deserve accessible solutions, delivered quickly, by someone who understands their reality.
story.section2_p2: That's exactly what I do: turning business problems into operational AI solutions, from prototype to production.

fullstack.title: Fullstack AI development
fullstack.description: Complete architecture of AI applications: React, Node.js, Supabase, Vercel. From frontend to AI pipeline through serverless APIs.

integration.title: Model integration
integration.description: Gemini, Claude, OpenAI — I work with the main AI platforms and adapt quickly to my clients' technical environments.

analysis.title: Functional analysis
analysis.description: 20 years translating business needs into technical solutions. I understand your business before I code.

data.title: Data science
data.description: University training in computer science, bioinformatics and data science. Microsoft (AI-102, DP-100, PL-300) and Coursera (ML, generative AI) certifications.

items.description: Development of PennySEO, AI consulting, prototyping intelligent applications.
Requirements analysis and functional documentation for the SEAO system.
SQI, Ministry of Justice, CHU de Québec. Financial, healthcare, and justice applications.
Bioinformatics application development, Oracle/C# systems, genomic data processing.
Early career in software development and analysis in the public sector.

hero.title: What I build.

pennyseo.title: PennySEO
pennyseo.subtitle: SaaS platform for SEO optimization powered by artificial intelligence.
pennyseo.image_alt: Preview of the PennySEO main dashboard

problem.title: The problem
problem.text: Etsy sellers spend hours hunting for the right keywords for their product listings. The process is manual, tedious, and the results are often mediocre — wrong keywords, poor visibility, lost sales.

solution.title: The solution
solution.text: PennySEO automates the entire SEO pipeline with AI. Users upload a product image, and the app automatically generates optimized keywords, scored and ranked by relevance.

visual.title: Visual analysis
visual.description: Gemini Vision analyzes the product image and identifies visual features, style, and category.

scoring.title: Smart scoring
scoring.description: Each keyword gets a score based on purchase intent, search volume, competition, and topical relevance.

seo.title: SEO optimization
seo.description: Automatic generation of titles and descriptions optimized for Etsy, with the 13 best tags selected.

dashboard.caption: Main dashboard — SEO pipeline overview with performance metrics, shop health score, and recommended actions.

keywords.caption: Keyword performance table — Scoring by purchase intent, search volume, trend, and competition. Selection of the 13 best tags.

favorites.caption: Favorite keywords bank — Smart filtering by category (Gems, Trending, High Volume, Low Competition), preset management.

speed.title: Results in seconds
speed.description: A full product analysis — from image to optimized keywords — takes seconds, not hours.

scoring.title: Data-driven scoring
scoring.description: Each keyword is evaluated on 4 measurable criteria: purchase intent, volume, competition, and relevance. No guesswork.

calibration.title: Precision-calibrated prompts
calibration.description: Over 100 calibration examples ensure consistent, reliable results, product after product.

security.title: Secure data
security.description: Secure authentication, data isolated per user. Each seller only sees their own products.

upcoming.title: More projects coming
upcoming.subtitle: I'm continuously working on new AI solutions. Check back soon to discover what's next.

notFound.title: Article not found
notFound.subtitle: This article doesn't exist or has been removed.

denied.title: Access denied

fields.coverImageHint: Drag an image or click to pick a file (JPG, PNG, WebP).
fields.tagsHint: Press Enter to add a tag.

generator.title: Generate with AI
generator.subtitle: Describe your topic and let AI draft a bilingual article you can review.
generator.topicPlaceholder: Ex: How SMEs can automate customer service with AI
generator.instructionsPlaceholder: Extra guidance, specific angle, keywords to include…
generator.loadingHint: Takes 1 to 3 minutes. The AI researches first, then writes the full article in both French and English.
generator.error: Generation failed. Retry or write it manually.
generator.errorTimeout: The generation timed out. Try again in a moment.
generator.imagePromptHint: Paste this prompt into DALL-E, Midjourney or another tool to generate the image.
generator.replaceHint: The slug, publish date and cover image will be preserved.
generator.pasteFormatError: The clipboard content doesn't match the Topic Finder format. Use the 'Copy for blog' button in Topic Finder.
generator.researchNotUsed: Article generated without web research (Perplexity unavailable)

imagePromptGen.title: Generated image prompts
imagePromptGen.nanoBananaHint: Paste the prompt into Nano Banana Pro to generate the image.

diagram.title: Generate a diagram
diagram.subtitle: AI analyzes your article and creates a diagram illustrating the main concept.
diagram.previewSubtitle: Preview and insert into the article, or regenerate with different parameters.
diagram.instructionsPlaceholder: Ex: focus on steps 1 to 3, use simple icons…
diagram.insertAtEnd: At the end of the article
diagram.loadingHint: Takes 20 to 40 seconds. AI designs the diagram, then the browser renders it to an image.
diagram.error: Generation failed. Try again in a moment.
diagram.minContent: Add at least 100 characters of content to enable generation.
diagram.bilingualHint: Two diagrams will be generated (FR + EN) in parallel.
diagram.singleHint: One diagram in {{lang}} will be generated (the other language has too little content).
